subject: Re: ME
body:
Guess bottom line to you is   'gooD"     but I twisted last  week which is a 
no-no , along with bend, lift (a little  tough with limited help)    but I 
survived --- just set me back a  few weeks  .
MARCIA will be OK.  Wish you were closer  by.      How are YOU 
??????????????????
 
Marcia M.

Hope yooooou are well.     I'm happy I'm just OK.  
Love and a Hug or two ,
Marcia Mae
